tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Demonstrative Pronouns.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Demonstrative Pronouns का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This is my pen. This is a good book. This is my house. This is my phone. This is a table.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) about your day using Demonstrative Pronouns.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने दिन के बारे में Demonstrative Pronouns का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This is my bag. This is an apple. This is my office. This is a new car. This is my chair.

tasks.prompt: Translate the following into English: "यह मेरा कमरा है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "This are my phone."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue between two people using Demonstrative Pronouns.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Demonstrative Pronouns का उपयोग करते हुए दो व्यक्तियों के बीच 4 पंक्तियों का संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This is a good hotel. This is my report. This is an important document. This is my key.
